creator: clefevre@citeweb.net
text:
Akinori MUSHA wrote:
> At Wed, 12 Sep 2001 21:00:02 -0700 (PDT),
> Cyrille Lefevre wrote:
> >  in attachment, you'll find the original patch set w/ a reduced diff.
> >  IMHO, @dirrm should not complain on non empty directories and using
> >  @unexec rmdir 2> /dev/null || : is something we shouldn't use.
> 
> Yeah.. and we have another mess here.  Because of a checksum problem
> with symlinks, we have to put each symlink prior to the file it points
> to, in a pkg-list.
> 
> I'll swap the sequence of each pair of LC_MESSAGES/fileutils.mo and
> LC_TIME, and then commit.

don't know about that ! 
next time, I'll use "@exec ln -s" as usually I do...
now, I know why I always do that ;^)

thanks anyway.

Cyrille.
